text:
EXPLANATION: The GitHub repository at https://github.com/tatsu-lab/alpaca_eval confirms this is a real software/project citation. The official BibTeX on the repository itself lists exactly the cited authors (Xuechen Li, Tianyi Zhang, Yann Dubois, Rohan Taori, Ishaan Gulrajani, Carlos Guestrin, Percy Liang, Tatsunori B. Hashimoto) and the exact cited title. The automated checker's "author mismatch" reflects that the GitHub organization account is "tatsu-lab," not an error in the cited reference.
LINK: https://github.com/tatsu-lab/alpaca_eval
FOUND_TITLE: AlpacaEval: An Automatic Evaluator of Instruction-following Models
FOUND_AUTHORS: Xuechen Li, Tianyi Zhang, Yann Dubois, Rohan Taori, Ishaan Gulrajani, Carlos Guestrin, Percy Liang, Tatsunori B. Hashimoto
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
